goals: Discover what unit conversion categories are available for reference
Explore available units within a specific category relevant to travel planning
Convert a distance measurement from metric to imperial for trip planning
Convert a speed limit from km/h to mph for driving abroad

user_agent_config.personality: Practical and methodical, values clear information and preparation. Provides supportive guidance while focusing on concrete tasks.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Familiar with basic unit types but unsure of specific conversion formulas. Does not know tool names or internal APIs. Relies on assistant to provide conversion results.

end_condition: The user has completed all unit conversions needed for their travel planning and understands the converted values.
